description: Create a new feature or bug track with spec and plan

preconditions.requirement: Every project-scoped packet call includes root
If a required packet returns ok:false, halt and report the packet error

packetFlow.instruction: Resolve the project root with `cadre_project` using `action: "root"`. Include concrete examples in your draft: `spec.functional_requirements` and `spec.acceptance_criteria` should be arrays of `{ heading, body }`; `spec.out_of_scope` should state boundaries; `plan.phases[].tasks[]` should include specific titles, expected file claims, dependencies, and manual verification tasks when behavior is user-facing or integration-heavy.

Before drafting, load the Cadre artifact schemas for `spec` and `plan` with `cadre_artifact` action `schema` or `cadre://artifact-schema?artifact=spec|plan`. Draft structured `spec` and `plan` JSON from the user request and current project context only when minimum intent is clear: goal, outcome, acceptance criteria, and scope. Include the literal schema identifiers `spec.schema:"cadre.spec.v1"` and `plan.schema:"cadre.plan.v1"`. Use canonical snake_case fields such as `functional_requirements`, `acceptance_criteria`, `out_of_scope`, and `phases`; put task objects under `plan.phases[].tasks`, not top-level `plan.tasks`. Do not invent missing product or track requirements, and do not send Markdown fields such as `specText`, `planText`, or `planPath`.

Review only `approval.current_stage` using the returned canonical JSON artifact, generated Markdown projection preview, plan assistance when relevant, and review_bundle target/review paths; manifest_path may be null in target mode. When the user approves that stage, call newtrack again with `approvalSessionId`, `approvalStage`, and `approvedStages` containing exactly one additional stage in order. Do not inline large generated artifacts into model context.

To create the track only after spec, plan, metadata, and learnings stages are approved, call `cadre_workflow` again with `workflow: "newtrack"`, `execute: true`, `approvalComplete: true`, and the same `approvalSessionId` using the same JSON payload.

To create the track only after spec, plan, metadata, and learnings stages are approved, call `cadre_workflow` again with `workflow: "newtrack"`, `execute: true`, and `approvalComplete: true` using the same JSON payload.
Summarize created track id, native event record, worktree plan, changed canonical JSON artifacts, generated human projections, and next packet.

forbiddenActions: Do not recreate Cadre control-plane, native event/message state, index, worktree, provider, merge, or cleanup state with shell commands
Do not read or write Markdown projections as canonical state
Do not use Markdown payload fields, legacy Markdown import, or prompt-side state repair

functional_requirements.heading: Concrete behavior
functional_requirements.body: What must change and who benefits.

acceptance_criteria.heading: Verifiable outcome
acceptance_criteria.body: Specific test, command, or manual check that proves completion.
